title: [FIRRTL] Emitter support for widthCast, resetCast
body:
Support needed for these so we can export parsed FIRRTL as they're now present in most designs.

Consider this example:

```
$ < cast.fir tee /dev/stderr | ./build/bin/firtool --parse-only -format=fir | ./build/bin/circt-translate --export-firrtl
circuit Cast:
  module Cast:
    input x : UInt<1>
    output y: UInt
    y <= x
; -----
circuit Cast :
  module Cast :
    input x : UInt<1>
    output y : UInt

    y <= <stdin>:4:12: error: 'firrtl.widthCast' op not supported as expression
      %0 = firrtl.widthCast %x : (!firrtl.uint<1>) -> !firrtl.uint
           ^
<stdin>:4:12: note: see current operation: %0 = "firrtl.widthCast"(%arg0) : (!firrtl.uint<1>) -> !firrtl.uint
<unsupported-expr-widthCast> @[<stdin> 5:7]
```
